identification: M_R seesaw scale = the keV Dirac floor lifted by the throat↔antithroat tunnelling action: M_R = m_D·e^{S}, S = ln(m_D/m_ν) ≈ 15–18; barrier-height M_R falsified
mechanism: ΔL=2 Majorana = PR #58 throat↔antithroat (antipodal Z₂) transition
selection_rule: PR #58 Σc₁=0 ⟹ only k=0 (c₁=0) gets single-state Majorana
falsified: M_R = nucleation barrier height E_c (~keV, ~10⁸ too small)
open: the bounce action S (PR #58 instanton-rate follow-on)
b4_caveat: m_D from cavity floor + electron anchor; S open; absolute m_ν needs S + L_eff unification + B4 anchor

tests.name: T1_required_M_R_recap
tests.description: PR #86: M_R = m_D²/m_ν ≈ 0.3–1.8 TeV is the open heavy scale. No BAM catalog scale lands at ~TeV; this probe tests the PR #58 nucleation/compliance origin.

tests.name: T2_majorana_is_throat_antithroat_transition
tests.description: Majorana mass = state ↔ antiparticle = throat ↔ antithroat = inner/outer swap C (c₁→−c₁, PR #63) = the antipodal Z₂ nucleated in PR #58. The ΔL=2 coupling lives in the PR #58 nucleation framework.

tests.name: T3_selection_rule_from_sigma_c1_zero
tests.description: PR #58's Σc₁=0 on a single flipping state: k=0 conserves (0→0) ⟹ Majorana allowed; k≠0 gives Σc₁=∓2 ⟹ forbidden ⟹ Dirac. PR #86's only-neutrino selection rule IS PR #58's conservation law for a single state.

tests.name: T4_barrier_height_hypothesis_falsified
tests.description: Hypothesis A (M_R = nucleation barrier E_c=(16π/3)σ³/ρ²): with the electron-throat σ,ρ, E_c ≈ 2.8 keV, R_c ≈ 0.22 R* — ~10⁸–10⁹ below the required ~TeV. The soft vacuum bubble is the maximally compliant channel; its barrier height is not the heavy Majorana scale. FALSIFIED.

tests.name: T5_boundary_compliance_reading
tests.description: The PR #58 bubble is the maximally compliant (softest) throat-opening channel (~keV barrier). A literal heavy M_R is a stiff, low-compliance response / an unobserved ~TeV partner — neither exists in BAM. So a static barrier-height/compliance origin of M_R is excluded; the heavy scale must be DYNAMICAL (tunnelling), not static.

tests.name: T6_throat_antithroat_tunnelling
tests.description: Hypothesis B: m_ν = m_D·e^{−S} (tunnelling through the PR #58 barrier). Required S = ln(m_D/m_ν) ≈ 15–18 — modest, O(15), generation-stable. M_R = m_D·e^{S}: the keV Dirac floor exponentially lifted, not a fundamental TeV scale.

tests.name: T7_honest_scope
tests.description: Mechanism + selection rule established from PR #58; barrier-height M_R falsified; tunnelling exponent S the open follow-on.
established_bam_native: ΔL=2 Majorana coupling = PR #58 throat↔antithroat (antipodal Z₂) transition
PR #58 Σc₁=0 on a single state IS PR #86 only-neutrino selection rule (k=0 Majorana, k≠0 Dirac)
literal M_R = nucleation barrier height FALSIFIED (~keV, ~10⁸ too small)
suppression = tunnelling through that barrier: M_R = m_D·e^{S}, S = ln(m_D/m_ν) ≈ 15–18 (O(15), gen-stable)
open: the bounce action S from first principles (needs the throat inertia / Euclidean action normalisation of the BAM throat sector — the instanton-rate follow-on PR #58 flagged)
absolute m_ν (needs S + L_eff unification from PR #83 + B4 anchor)
tests.net_progress: M_R's open input is recast from a mysterious ~TeV mass (6 orders above any BAM scale, no candidate state) to a modest, generation-stable O(15) bounce action — a far more constrained, BAM-shaped unknown tied to PR #58's own instanton follow-on.

tests.name: T8_assessment
tests.description: PR #58's nucleation framework supplies the ΔL=2 mechanism and the only-neutrino selection rule (Σc₁=0). M_R is NOT the barrier height (~10⁸ too small) but the keV Dirac floor lifted by a throat↔antithroat tunnelling action S ≈ 15–18 — the open instanton-rate follow-on.

verdict:
SEESAW SUPPRESSION IS THROAT ↔ ANTITHROAT TUNNELLING; THE BOUNCE ACTION S IS OPEN. PR #86 left the Majorana seesaw scale M_R ≈ 0.3–1.8 TeV as an open heavy input. This probe grounds it in the PR #58 throat-nucleation framework.

THE ΔL=2 MECHANISM IS THE PR #58 TRANSITION. A Majorana mass flips a state into its antiparticle — in BAM the antithroat, the inner/outer swap C (c₁ → −c₁, PR #63), the antipodal Z₂ whose vacuum nucleation PR #58 analysed. So the ΔL=2 coupling lives natively in the PR #58 nucleation barrier.

THE SELECTION RULE IS PR #58's Σc₁=0. Applied to a SINGLE state flipping throat ↔ antithroat: k=0 (c₁=0) flips 0 → −0 = 0, conserving Σc₁ with no partner, so a single-state ΔL=2 (Majorana) mass is ALLOWED; k≠0 (c₁=±1) would give Σc₁ = ∓2 ≠ 0, forbidden — a ΔL=2 mass needs a pair, so the charged lepton stays Dirac. PR #86's "only the c₁=0 sector is Majorana" IS PR #58's conservation law for a single state. The two PRs are one statement.

M_R IS NOT THE BARRIER HEIGHT. The most direct hypothesis — M_R = the nucleation barrier E_c = (16π/3)σ³/ρ² — fails on scale. With the brane tension σ and bag density ρ fixed by the electron throat, E_c ≈ 0.0055 m_e c² ≈ 2.8 keV and R_c ≈ 0.22 R*: ~10⁸–10⁹ BELOW the required ~TeV. The soft vacuum bubble is the MAXIMALLY COMPLIANT throat-opening channel; its barrier height cannot be the heavy Majorana scale, and BAM has no stiff ~TeV barrier or partner state. A static barrier-height / compliance origin is excluded.

THE SUPPRESSION IS TUNNELLING THROUGH THE BARRIER. PR #58 flagged the tunnelling/instanton rate as its open follow-on. If the Majorana mass is the throat ↔ antithroat tunnelling AMPLITUDE through the barrier rather than its height, then m_ν = m_D·e^{−S} with S the Euclidean bounce action. The required action is the data-derived S = ln(m_D/m_ν) ≈ 17.6, 16.0, 14.7 (gen 1, 2, 3) — modest, O(15), and generation-stable. Equivalently M_R = m_D²/m_ν = m_D·e^{S}: the ~TeV seesaw scale is NOT a fundamental heavy mass but the keV Dirac floor (the cavity zero-point) EXPONENTIALLY LIFTED by the throat ↔ antithroat tunnelling action.

NET PROGRESS. The open input is recast from a mysterious ~TeV mass (6 orders above any BAM scale, with no candidate state) into a modest, generation-stable O(15) bounce action — a far more constrained, BAM-shaped unknown that is exactly PR #58's own flagged instanton follow-on.

HONEST SCOPE. ESTABLISHED (BAM-native): the ΔL=2 mechanism is the PR #58 throat↔antithroat transition; PR #58's Σc₁=0 IS PR #86's only-neutrino selection rule; the literal M_R = barrier-height hypothesis is falsified (~10⁸ too small); the suppression is tunnelling through the barrier, M_R = m_D·e^{S} with S ≈ 15–18. NOT established: the value of S from first principles (needs the BAM throat inertia / Euclidean action normalisation — the instanton-rate follow-on), the absolute m_ν, and PMNS mixing.
